channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16855] sanity-scrub test_4c: lfs mkdir: dirstripe error on '/mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4': Input/output error
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/39a8e556-67d9-4bdd-9f44-d6e54e01f3fc

test_4c failed with the following error:

mkdir -i 3 -c1 -H all_char /mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4 failed

lfs mkdir: dirstripe error on '/mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4': Input/output error

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/95162 - 4.18.0-425.10.1.el8_7.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/95162 - 4.18.0-425.10.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

creating 500 files on mds3
striped dir -i2 -c1 -H fnv_1a_64 /mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds3
1+0 records in
1+0 records out
1048576 bytes (1.0 MB, 1.0 MiB) copied, 0.00404275 s, 259 MB/s
CMD: trevis-99vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n debug
CMD: trevis-100vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-100vm2,trevis-100vm3,trevis-99vm3,trevis-99vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=0
CMD: trevis-100vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-100vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug=\"super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console lfsck\"
CMD: trevis-100vm3,trevis-99vm3,trevis-99vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug=\"super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console lfsck\"
creating 500 files on mds4
striped dir -i3 -c1 -H all_char /mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4
lfs mkdir: dirstripe error on '/mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4': Input/output error
lfs setdirstripe: cannot create dir '/mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4': Input/output error
sanity-scrub test_4c: @@@@@@ FAIL: mkdir -i 3 -c1 -H all_char /mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4 failed 
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6579:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:9239:test_mkdir()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-scrub.sh:102:scrub_prep()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-scrub.sh:573:test_4c()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6919:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6968:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6805:run_test()

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-scrub test_4c - mkdir -i 3 -c1 -H all_char /mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4 failed
item.summary: sanity-scrub test_4c: lfs mkdir: dirstripe error on '/mnt/lustre/d4c.sanity-scrub/mds4': Input/output error

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
